metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4802
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1B and movie S4: superresolution microscopy (3D-STORM) showed that Ryk colocalized with both presynaptic marker Bassoon and postsynaptic marker PSD-95. Signal for this antibody is much weaker than other proteins shown in this figure, but the images and movie shown in S4 together are suggestive of the model proposed by authors in Figure 1C.

Based on the known transmembrane topology of this protein, "integral component of ... membrane" term was selected. As also depicted by authors in Figure 1C.. Experimental description: M&M: "Hippocampi were dissected from E18.5 mice, and hippocampal neuron culture was performed as previously described"

antibody:
mouse anti-Ryk (generated in the Zou laboratory)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
